NeuroNest

AI Wellness Companion

In crisis? Call iCall: 9152987821 (India) or 988 (US) — available 24/7

Hey, I'm NeuroNest 🧠

Your safe space to express how you're feeling. I'm here to listen, understand, and help you feel better — one conversation at a time.

How are you feeling right now?
😤 I'm really stressed
😰 Feeling anxious
😢 I'm feeling sad
😊 I'm doing great!
🤯 Overwhelmed
🥺 Feeling lonely

Type a message below or use the 🎙️ mic button to share how you're feeling

NeuroNest is a wellness companion, not a substitute for professional mental health care.
